title: Redis cache-aside
text: Read from cache first. On miss, load from DB, write to cache with TTL, return data. Invalidate on writes.

title: JWT refresh rotation
text: Issue short-lived access tokens and long-lived refresh tokens. Rotate refresh on use and revoke on logout.

title: LLM rate limits
text: Handle HTTP 429 with exponential backoff. Track token usage per user. Set max tokens per request.

title: NestJS modules
text: Group controllers, providers, and imports by domain. Export only what other modules need.
